entries.definition:
كتاب السّين

سيل

(سأل) السين والهمزة واللام كلمةٌ واحدةٌ. يقال سأل يسأل سؤالاً ومَسْأَلةً. ورجل سُؤَلةٌ: كثير السؤال.

s—ʾ—l asking, inquiring, requesting, quest. Of this root, nine forms occur 127 times in the Qurʾan: سأل saʾala 85 times; سئل suʾila 19 times; تتساءلون tasāʾalūn nine times; سؤل suʾl once; سؤال suʾāl once; سائل sāʾil four times; سائلين sāʾilīn three times; مسؤول masʾūl four times and مسؤولون masʾūlūn once.
سأل saʾala I [v. trans.; imper. إسأل ʾisʾal and سل sal; pass. v. سئل suʾila] 1 to ask (29:63) ولئن سألتهم من نزّل من السماء ماءً and if you ask them, ‘Who sends water down from the sky’ 2 to question, to interrogate (21:63) قال بل فعله كبيرهم هذا فاسألوهم إن كانوا ينطقون he said, ‘No, it was this great one of them that did it—question them, if they can talk’ 3 [with prep. عن] a) to inquire after, to seek information of (33:20) يسألون عن أنبائكم seeking news of you b) to query, to seek clarification (18:76) قال إن سألتك عن شيء بعدها فلا تصاحبني he said, ‘If I query anything after it [this], do not keep
entries.definition_english:
s—ʾ—l asking, inquiring, requesting, quest. Of this root, nine forms occur 127 times in the Qurʾan: سأل saʾala 85 times; سئل suʾila 19 times; تتساءلون tasāʾalūn nine times; سؤل suʾl once; سؤال suʾāl once; سائل sāʾil four times; سائلين sāʾilīn three times; مسؤول masʾūl four times and مسؤولون masʾūlūn once.
سأل saʾala I [v. trans.; imper. إسأل ʾisʾal and سل sal; pass. v. سئل suʾila] 1 to ask (29:63) ولئن سألتهم من نزّل من السماء ماءً and if you ask them, ‘Who sends water down from the sky’ 2 to question, to interrogate (21:63) قال بل فعله كبيرهم هذا فاسألوهم إن كانوا ينطقون he said, ‘No, it was this great one of them that did it—question them, if they can talk’ 3 [with prep. عن] a) to inquire after, to seek information of (33:20) يسألون عن أنبائكم seeking news of you b) to query, to seek clarification (18:76) قال إن سألتك عن شيء بعدها فلا تصاحبني he said, ‘If I query anything after it [this], do not keep

entries.definition:
413
company with me’ c) to seek advice, to seek guidance (2:219) يسألونك عن الخمر والميسر they ask you [Prophet] about intoxicants and gambling d) to be taken to task, to be called to account (16:93) ولتسألنّ عمّا كنتم تعملون you will certainly be called to account for your deeds; *(21:23) لا يسأل عمّا يفعل He is His own master [lit. He is not called to account for what He does]; *(2:119) ولا تُسأل عن أصحاب الجحيم [Prophet] You will not be responsible for [lit. questioned about] the inhabitants of the Blaze; *(28:78) ولا يسأل عن ذنوبهم المجرمون it is of no avail to question the sinners about their sins [lit. the sinners will not be questioned about their sins] 4 [with prep. ب] to demand, to urge (70:1) سأل سائل بعذاب واقع a man [mockingly] demanded the coming of [the threatened] punishment II [doubly trans.] to ask someone for something, to beg (20:132) لا نسألك رزقاً نحن نرزقك We do not ask of you any provision; We provide for you.

يتساءلون yatasāʾalūn [imperf. of v. VI; intrans.] 1 to question one another (18:19) وكذلك بعثناهم ليتساءلوا بينهم and thus We woke them, so that they question one another 2 to request things from one another (4:1) واتقوا الله الذي تساءلون به be mindful of God, in whose name you make requests of one another.

سؤل suʾl [n./v. n.] request (20:36) قال قد أوتيت سؤلك ياموسى He said, ‘You have been granted your request, Moses.’

سؤال suʾāl [v. n.] asking for, demanding (38:24) لقد ظلمك بسؤال نعجتك إلى نعاجه he has wronged you by demanding your ewe [to be added] to his ewes.

سائل sāʾil [n./act. part.] 1 beggar (70:25) للسائل والمحروم for the beggar and the deprived 2 one who asks, one who seeks information or knowledge (12:7) لقد كان في يوسف وإخوته آيات للسائلين in Joseph and his brothers, there are lessons for those who seek them 3 one who demands or requests (70:1) سأل سائل بعذاب واقع a man [mockingly] demanded the coming of [the threatened] punishment.

مسؤول masʾūl [pass. part.] 1 one who is questioned, interrogated (37:24) وقفوهم إنهم مسؤولون and halt them, for they are to be questioned 2 [something] exacted, honoured; to be

414    س/ء/م

accounted for, to be answered for (33:15) ولقد كانوا عاهدوا الله من قبل لا يولّون الأدبار وكان عهد الله مسؤولاً yet they had previously made an agreement with God that they would not turn tail and flee, and an agreement with God shall be exacted.
